name: Bug report / 问题反馈
about: Something doesn't work / 工具用不了或行为不对
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

<!-- English or 中文 both fine. 中英文皆可。 -->

## What happened / 问题描述


## Steps / 复现步骤
1. Command you ran / 你运行的命令:
   ```
   python wechat_send.py --to "..." --msg "..." ...
   ```
2.

## Full console output / 完整控制台输出
<!-- On failure the JSON includes an `ocr` field — please paste it, it's key for debugging.
     失败时返回的 JSON 含 `ocr` 字段,请一并贴上,对排查很关键。 -->
```
(paste here)
```

## Environment / 环境
- WeChat version (Weixin.exe ProductVersion) / 微信版本:
- Windows version / 系统版本:
- Screen resolution / 屏幕分辨率:
- Display scaling (DPI) / 缩放比例(如 100%/125%/150%):
- WeChat window size & maximized? / 微信窗口大小、是否最大化:
- Python version / Python 版本:

## Expected / 期望行为
